quoteFirst: On the Monday morning I went to bed at 5 A.M., and had to be on duty in the Out-Patient Department at 8 A.M. We had a heavy day; and when we finished at 5.30 P.M., you can imagine my disgust at receiving a message from Matron that I was to relieve the nurse who was in quarantine with a whooping-cough case, from
quoteLast: I was very glad the child whooped fairly often, as otherwise I should probably have gone to sleep.
title: A Nurse's Life in War and Peace
author: Laurence, E. C. (Eleanor Constance); Treves, Frederick, 1853-1923 [Author of introduction, etc.]
